homepage.heroSubline: Powering Louisville homes and businesses with reliable electrical services. Decades of experience tackling Kentucky's toughest electrical challenges.
aboutText: Cundiff Electric Inc. has been serving the Louisville community for over a decade. Founded by seasoned electricians with a passion for quality workmanship and customer satisfaction, we've built a reputation for excellence in every project we undertake.

Our approach is simple: prioritize safety, deliver exceptional results, and treat every customer with respect. We understand the unique electrical needs of Louisville homes and businesses, from dealing with older wiring in historic neighborhoods to installing cutting-edge systems in new developments.

We're committed to being a responsible member of the Louisville community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to minimize our environmental impact through sustainable practices. When you choose Cundiff Electric, you're choosing a company that cares about Louisville.

valueProps.title: Experienced Professionals
valueProps.description: Our team consists of licensed and highly trained electricians with years of experience in the Louisville area.

valueProps.title: 24/7 Emergency Service
valueProps.description: Electrical emergencies don't wait for business hours. We're available around the clock to handle urgent situations.

valueProps.title: Upfront Pricing
valueProps.description: We provide clear and transparent pricing with no hidden fees. You'll know exactly what to expect before we start any work.

valueProps.title: Guaranteed Satisfaction
valueProps.description: We stand behind our work and are committed to ensuring your complete satisfaction. Your safety and peace of mind are our top priorities.

services.name: Electrical Repair Services
services.shortDescription: Fast and reliable electrical repairs for your Louisville home or business.
services.description:
From flickering lights to complete power outages, electrical problems can disrupt your life and pose serious safety hazards. At Cundiff Electric, we offer comprehensive electrical repair services to address any issue you may encounter. Our experienced electricians are equipped to diagnose and repair electrical problems quickly and efficiently, ensuring the safety and functionality of your electrical system.

We handle a wide range of electrical repairs, including faulty wiring, damaged outlets, broken circuit breakers, and malfunctioning appliances. We understand the importance of prompt service, especially during emergencies. That's why we offer 24/7 emergency repair services to address urgent electrical problems and minimize potential risks. Our team is familiar with the older wiring systems common in neighborhoods like Old Louisville, as well as the demands of modern electrical systems in newer developments.

We use only high-quality materials and follow strict safety protocols to ensure lasting repairs that meet or exceed industry standards. Our goal is to provide you with peace of mind knowing that your electrical system is in safe and reliable hands. We'll always explain the problem clearly and provide you with upfront pricing before starting any work.
process: Step 1: Contact us to schedule a repair appointment.
Step 2: Our electrician will arrive on time and assess the problem.
Step 3: We'll provide you with a clear explanation of the issue and a detailed quote.
Step 4: Upon your approval, we'll complete the repair quickly and efficiently.

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to an electrical emergency?
faq.answer: We offer 24/7 emergency service and strive to respond to urgent calls as quickly as possible. Our response time will depend on our current workload and your location within the Louisville area.

faq.question: Are your electricians licensed and insured?
faq.answer: Yes, all of our electricians are fully licensed and insured. We adhere to the highest standards of safety and professionalism.

faq.question: What types of electrical repairs do you handle?
faq.answer: We handle a wide range of electrical repairs, including faulty wiring, damaged outlets, broken circuit breakers, and malfunctioning appliances. No job is too big or too small.

services.name: Electrical Installation Services
services.shortDescription: Professional electrical installations for homes and businesses in Louisville.
services.description:
Whether you're building a new home in the Louisville suburbs, renovating an existing property in the Highlands, or upgrading your commercial space in NuLu, Cundiff Electric offers comprehensive electrical installation services to meet your needs. Our experienced electricians are skilled in all aspects of electrical installation, from wiring and lighting to panel upgrades and generator installations.

We work closely with homeowners, contractors, and business owners to ensure that every installation is completed to the highest standards of quality and safety. We understand the unique challenges presented by Louisville's diverse housing stock, from older homes with outdated wiring to new construction projects with complex electrical demands. We are also very familiar with the electrical needs of local businesses, including restaurants, breweries, and distilleries.

Our installation services include: new construction wiring, lighting design and installation, panel upgrades, generator installation, appliance wiring, and electrical safety inspections. We use only high-quality materials and follow strict safety protocols to ensure lasting performance and compliance with all local codes. We're committed to providing you with a safe, reliable, and energy-efficient electrical system that meets your specific needs.
process: Step 1: Contact us to discuss your electrical installation needs.
Step 2: We'll provide you with a detailed quote based on your project requirements.
Step 3: Our electricians will complete the installation efficiently and professionally.
Step 4: We'll conduct a thorough inspection to ensure everything is working properly.

faq.question: Do you offer free estimates for electrical installations?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer free estimates for all electrical installation projects. Contact us to schedule a consultation.

faq.question: How long will my electrical installation take?
faq.answer: The duration of the installation will depend on the scope and complexity of the project. We'll provide you with a realistic timeline during the estimate process.

faq.question: Do you handle permits and inspections?
faq.answer: Yes, we can handle all necessary permits and inspections to ensure compliance with local regulations.

services.name: Lighting Services
services.shortDescription: Enhance your Louisville property with expert lighting design and installation.
services.description:
Proper lighting can transform the look and feel of your home or business. At Cundiff Electric, we offer a full range of lighting services to enhance the ambiance, functionality, and energy efficiency of your property. Whether you're looking to upgrade your existing lighting fixtures, install new lighting in a remodeled space, or create a custom lighting design for your outdoor living area, we have the expertise to bring your vision to life.

We specialize in a variety of lighting solutions, including recessed lighting, track lighting, pendant lighting, landscape lighting, and security lighting. We work with a wide range of lighting styles and technologies, including LED lighting, which offers significant energy savings and long-lasting performance. Our team is familiar with the unique lighting needs of Louisville homes and businesses, from the charm of historic homes in Old Louisville to the modern aesthetics of NuLu lofts.

We offer comprehensive lighting design services to help you create the perfect lighting scheme for your space. We'll consider factors such as room size, ceiling height, natural light, and your personal preferences to develop a lighting plan that maximizes both functionality and aesthetics. We also offer professional lighting installation services to ensure that your new lighting is installed safely and correctly.
process: Step 1: Schedule a consultation to discuss your lighting needs and preferences.
Step 2: We'll develop a custom lighting design plan for your space.
Step 3: We'll provide you with a detailed quote for the lighting installation.
Step 4: Our electricians will complete the installation efficiently and professionally.

faq.question: What are the benefits of LED lighting?
faq.answer: LED lighting offers significant energy savings, long-lasting performance, and reduced maintenance costs. It's also more environmentally friendly than traditional lighting options.

faq.question: Can you help me choose the right lighting fixtures for my home?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer lighting design services to help you select the perfect fixtures for your style and budget.

faq.question: Do you offer outdoor lighting services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a full range of outdoor lighting services, including landscape lighting, security lighting, and patio lighting.

services.name: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your electrical panel for improved safety and performance in Louisville.
services.description:
Is your electrical panel outdated, overloaded, or showing signs of wear and tear? An electrical panel upgrade can improve the safety and performance of your electrical system, ensuring that it can handle the demands of modern appliances and electronics. At Cundiff Electric, we offer professional electrical panel upgrade services for homes and businesses in Louisville.

An outdated electrical panel can pose a fire hazard and may not be able to handle the electrical load of modern appliances and electronics. Signs that you may need an electrical panel upgrade include frequent tripped breakers, flickering lights, and a burning smell coming from the panel. We understand that many older homes in areas like Old Louisville and the Highlands were built with electrical panels that are no longer adequate for today's electrical needs.

Our experienced electricians can assess your current electrical panel and recommend the appropriate upgrade to meet your specific needs. We'll handle all aspects of the upgrade process, from disconnecting the old panel to installing the new one and ensuring that everything is working properly. We use only high-quality electrical panels and follow strict safety protocols to ensure a safe and reliable installation.
process: Step 1: Schedule an assessment of your electrical panel.
Step 2: We'll recommend the appropriate upgrade based on your needs.
Step 3: We'll provide you with a detailed quote for the panel upgrade.
Step 4: Our electricians will complete the upgrade safely and efficiently.

faq.question: How do I know if I need an electrical panel upgrade?
faq.answer: Signs that you may need an upgrade include frequent tripped breakers, flickering lights, and a burning smell coming from the panel.

faq.question: How long does an electrical panel upgrade take?
faq.answer: An electrical panel upgrade typically takes one to two days to complete.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for an electrical panel upgrade?
faq.answer: Yes, a permit is required for an electrical panel upgrade. We'll handle all necessary permits and inspections.

services.name: Generator Installation
services.shortDescription: Protect your Louisville home from power outages with a reliable generator.
services.description:
Louisville's weather can be unpredictable, with spring storms and winter ice capable of knocking out power for extended periods. A generator provides a reliable backup power source to keep your lights on, your appliances running, and your family safe during a power outage. At Cundiff Electric, we offer professional generator installation services for homes and businesses in Louisville.

We can help you choose the right generator for your needs, whether you're looking for a portable generator to power essential appliances or a whole-house generator that can keep your entire home running during an outage. We offer a wide range of generator brands and models to fit your budget and power requirements. We are also experienced in installing automatic transfer switches, which automatically switch to generator power when the utility power goes out.

Our experienced electricians will handle all aspects of the generator installation, from connecting the generator to your electrical system to ensuring that it is properly vented and grounded. We'll also provide you with instructions on how to operate and maintain your generator to ensure that it's ready when you need it most.
process: Step 1: Schedule a consultation to discuss your generator needs.
Step 2: We'll recommend the appropriate generator for your home or business.
Step 3: We'll provide you with a detailed quote for the generator installation.
Step 4: Our electricians will complete the installation safely and efficiently.

faq.question: What size generator do I need?
faq.answer: The size of generator you need will depend on the amount of power you want to be able to generate. We can help you determine the appropriate size based on your needs.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for generator installation?
faq.answer: Yes, a permit is typically required for generator installation. We'll handle all necessary permits and inspections.

faq.question: How often should I service my generator?
faq.answer: We recommend servicing your generator at least once a year to ensure that it's running properly.

services.name: Commercial Electrical Services
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive electrical solutions for Louisville businesses.
services.description:
Cundiff Electric provides comprehensive electrical services for businesses throughout Louisville. We understand the unique electrical demands of commercial properties, from retail stores and restaurants to office buildings and industrial facilities. Our experienced electricians are equipped to handle any electrical project, big or small, ensuring that your business operates safely and efficiently.

We offer a wide range of commercial electrical services, including: electrical system design and installation, lighting upgrades, panel upgrades, generator installation, data cabling, and electrical maintenance. We understand the importance of minimizing downtime, so we work quickly and efficiently to complete projects on time and within budget. We are familiar with the electrical codes and regulations specific to Louisville businesses and ensure that all of our work meets or exceeds those standards.

Whether you're opening a new business in NuLu, renovating an existing space in St. Matthews, or need ongoing electrical maintenance for your industrial facility, Cundiff Electric is here to provide you with reliable and professional service. We pride ourselves on building long-term relationships with our clients and becoming a trusted partner for all of their electrical needs.
process: Step 1: Contact us to discuss your commercial electrical needs.
Step 2: We'll provide you with a detailed quote based on your project requirements.
Step 3: Our electricians will complete the work efficiently and professionally.
Step 4: We'll conduct a thorough inspection to ensure everything is working properly.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency electrical services for businesses?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer 24/7 emergency electrical services for businesses in Louisville.

faq.question: Can you help me with lighting upgrades for my business?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a full range of lighting upgrade services, including LED lighting conversions.

faq.question: Do you offer electrical maintenance contracts for businesses?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer customized electrical maintenance contracts to keep your business running smoothly.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Cundiff Electric was a lifesaver! Our lights went out during a storm, and they came out within an hour. The electrician was professional and quickly fixed the problem. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: John B.
reviews.text: We needed to upgrade our electrical panel to handle our new appliances. Cundiff Electric provided a competitive quote and completed the job efficiently. Very happy with the results.

reviews.name: Emily K.
reviews.text: Cundiff Electric installed new recessed lighting in our kitchen, and it looks amazing! The electrician was very knowledgeable and provided great suggestions. The price was fair, and the work was excellent.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: Living in Louisville, we're used to power outages. Cundiff Electric installed a whole-house generator, and it's given us peace of mind knowing we'll have power during the next storm. The installation was smooth, and the team was great to work with.

reviews.name: Jessica R.
reviews.text: Cundiff Electric has been our go-to electrician for our restaurant for years. They are always responsive, professional, and get the job done right. They recently helped us with a lighting upgrade, and it made a huge difference in the ambiance of our dining room.

reviews.name: Michael T.
reviews.text: Had a tricky wiring issue in my old house in the Highlands. Cundiff Electric diagnosed the problem quickly and repaired it with no fuss. Great service and reasonable prices.
